sqlMap.sql: select c1.cabinet_id as cabinet_id, c1.cabinet_name1 as cabinet_name, c1.cabinet_name1 as cabinet_name1, c1.cabinet_name2 as cabinet_name2, c1.cabinet_level as cabinet_level, c1.cabinet_order as cabinet_step, case when (select count(c2.cabinet_id) from tbl_cb_cabinet c2 where c2.use_status = 1 and c1.cabinet_id = c2.parent_id and c1.company_id = c2.company_id and c1.tenant_id = c2.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub

i.use_status = 1 and i.tenant_id = #tenantId#
i.title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%')) escape '\'
i.summary like concat('%', concat(#summary#, '%')) escape '\'
i.title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%')) escape '\' i.summary like concat('%', concat(#summary#, '%')) escape '\'
i.creator_name1 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%')) escape '\' i.creator_name2 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%')) escape '\'
(i.create_date >= #startDate# and i.create_date <= #endDate#)

select i.item_id as item_id, i.cabinet_id as cabinet_id, i.item_type as item_type, i.title as title, i.summary as summary, i.creator_id as creator_id, i.creator_name1 as creator_name1, i.creator_name2 as creator_name2, i.department_id as department_id, i.department_name1 as department_name1, i.department_name2 as department_name2, i.content_path as content_path, (i.create_date + #offset#/(24*60)) as create_date, (i.update_date + #offset#/(24*60)) as update_date, i.use_status as use_status, i.update_id as update_id, i.delete_id as delete_id, i.company_id as company_id, i.tenant_id as tenant_id, case when #primary# = '1' then i.creator_name1 else i.creator_name2 end as creator_name, nvl ((select sum(f.file_size) from tbl_cb_attach_file f where f.item_id = i.item_id and f.tenant_id = i.tenant_id), 0) as item_size
select item_id as item_id, cabinet_id as cabinet_id, item_type as item_type, title as title, tenant_id as tenant_id from tbl_cb_item
sqlMap.select: select dept_cd_path from tbl_deptmaster where cn = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.cn = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and b.cn <> b.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 order by lpad(nvl(a.extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), a.displayname
select * from tbl_cb_admin_module where company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and active_status = 1 order by module_type desc
select * from tbl_cb_user_module where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and module_type in #typeList[]# order by module_type desc

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id, module_type from tbl_cb_user_module where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and module_type = #moduleType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cb_user_module (user_id, company_id, module_type, active_status, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #companyId#, #moduleType#, #activeStatus#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cb_user_module set active_status = #activeStatus# where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and module_type = #moduleType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_cb_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id from tbl_cb_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cb_config (user_id, company_id, list_count, preview_mode, content_wpercent, content_hpercent, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #companyId#, #listCount#, #prevMode#, #contentWPrev#, #contentHPrev#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cb_config set preview_mode = #prevMode#, list_count = #listCount#, content_wpercent = #contentWPrev#, content_hpercent = #contentHPrev# where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: select nvl(max(cabinet_id), 0) from tbl_cb_cabinet where tenant_id = #tenantId#
select nvl(max(cabinet_order), 0) from tbl_cb_cabinet where parent_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select * from tbl_cb_cabinet where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select * from tbl_cb_cabinet where cabinet_type = #type# and parent_id = -1 and creator_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_cb_cabinet ( cabinet_id, cabinet_name1, cabinet_name2, creator_id, creator_name1, creator_name2, department_id, department_name1, department_name2, cabinet_type, parent_id, cabinet_path, cabinet_order, cabinet_level, create_date, update_date, update_id, delete_id, use_status, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #cabinetId#, #cabinetName1#, #cabinetName2#, #creatorId#, #creatorName1#, #creatorName2#, #departmentId#, #departmentName1#, #departmentName2#, #cabinetType#, #parentId#, #cabinetPath#, #cabinetStep#, #cabinetLevel#, to_date(#createdDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), to_date(#updatedDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #updateId#, #deleterId#, #useStatus#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.update: update tbl_cb_cabinet set cabinet_name1 = #cabinetName1#, cabinet_name2 = #cabinetName2#, creator_name1 = #creatorName1#, creator_name2 = #creatorName2#, department_id = #departmentId#, department_name1 = #departmentName1#, department_name2 = #departmentName2#, cabinet_type = #cabinetType#, parent_id = #parentId#, cabinet_path = #cabinetPath#, cabinet_order = #cabinetStep#, cabinet_level = #cabinetLevel#, create_date = #createdDate#, update_date = #updatedDate#, update_id = #updateId#, delete_id = #deleterId#, use_status = #useStatus#, company_id = #companyId# where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
update tbl_cb_cabinet set use_status = 0, delete_id = #userId#, update_date = #timeUTC# where use_status = 1 and cabinet_path like concat(#cabinetPath#, '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId#

update tbl_cb_item i join ( select * from tbl_cb_cabinet where cabinet_path like concat(#cabinetPath#, '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c1 on i.cabinet_id = c1.cabinet_id and i.tenant_id = c1.tenant_id set i.use_status = 0, i.delete_id = #userId#, i.update_date = #timeUTC# where i.tenant_id = #tenantId# and i.use_status = 1
sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_cb_cabinet where parent_id = #parentId# and use_status = 1 and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by cabinet_level asc, cabinet_order asc

select nvl(sum(f.file_size), 0) from tbl_cb_attach_file f join ( select i.* from tbl_cb_item i join ( select * from tbl_cb_cabinet where cabinet_path like concat(#cabinetPath#, '%') and use_status = 1 and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c on i.cabinet_id = c.cabinet_id and i.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and i.use_status = 1 ) i1 on f.item_id = i1.item_id and f.tenant_id = i1.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId#
select count(*) from tbl_cb_cabinet where parent_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1
from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 where c1.creator_id = #userId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.cabinet_level = 0 and c1.use_status = 1 and c1.cabinet_type = #type#
from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 where c1.parent_id = #cabinetId# and c1.company_id = #companyId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.use_status = 1 order by c1.cabinet_order asc

from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 where ( (c1.parent_id in #listNodes[]#) or (c1.cabinet_id in #listNodes[]# and c1.parent_id = -1) ) and c1.company_id = #companyId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.use_status = 1 order by c1.cabinet_level asc, c1.cabinet_order asc
sqlMap.update: update tbl_cb_cabinet set update_date = #updateTime#, update_id = #userId#, cabinet_path = replace(cabinet_path, #oldPath#, #newPath#), cabinet_level = cabinet_level + #levelDistance# where cabinet_path like concat(concat(#oldPath#, '_'), '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
select c1.* from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 where c1.creator_id = #userId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.cabinet_level = 0 and c1.use_status = 1 and c1.cabinet_type in
#listType[]#

select distinct u.cn as cn, case when #primary# = '1' then u.title else u.title2 end as position, case when #primary# = '1' then u.displayname else u.displayname2 end as display_name, u.department as department, case when #primary# = '1' then u.description else u.description2 end as department_name, u.telephonenumber as telephone_number, u.mail as mail, u.extensionattribute2 as user_image from tbl_usermaster u join tbl_cb_share s on s.sharer_id = u.cn and s.tenant_id = u.tenant_id where s.sharer_id != #userId# and s.use_status = 1 and u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and ( (s.shared_id = #userId# and s.shared_type = 2) or (s.shared_id in
#deptList[]# and (s.shared_type = 0 or s.shared_type = 1) ) ) order by display_name desc

select distinct c1.cabinet_id as cabinet_id, c1.cabinet_name1 as cabinet_name, c1.cabinet_name1 as cabinet_name1, c1.cabinet_name2 as cabinet_name2, c1.cabinet_level as cabinet_level, c1.cabinet_order as cabinet_step, c1.cabinet_path as cabinet_path, case when (s.child_permission = 1 and (select count(c2.cabinet_id) from tbl_cb_cabinet c2 where c2.use_status = 1 and c1.cabinet_id = c2.parent_id and c1.tenant_id = c2.tenant_id) > 0) then 1 else 0 end as has_sub from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 join tbl_cb_share s on c1.cabinet_id = s.cabinet_id and s.sharer_id = #shareId# and s.tenant_id = c1.tenant_id and s.use_status = 1 where s.sharer_id != #userId# and c1.creator_id = #shareId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.use_status = 1 and ( (s.shared_id = #userId# and s.shared_type = 2) or (s.shared_id in
#deptList[]# and (s.shared_type = 0 or s.shared_type = 1) ) )

select distinct c1.cabinet_id as cabinet_id, c1.cabinet_name1 as cabinet_name, c1.cabinet_name1 as cabinet_name1, c1.cabinet_name2 as cabinet_name2, c1.cabinet_level as cabinet_level, c1.cabinet_order as cabinet_step, c1.cabinet_path as cabinet_path, case when (s.child_permission = 1 and (select count(c2.cabinet_id) from tbl_cb_cabinet c2 where c2.use_status = 1 and c1.cabinet_id = c2.parent_id and c1.tenant_id = c2.tenant_id) > 0) then 1 else 0 end as has_sub from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 join tbl_cb_share s on c1.cabinet_id = s.cabinet_id and s.sharer_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = c1.tenant_id and s.use_status = 1 where c1.creator_id = #userId# and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and c1.use_status = 1

select c3.* from (
select * from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 where c1.cabinet_id in
#cabinetList[]#
and c1.use_status = 1 and c1.tenant_id = #tenantId#
union select c2.* from tbl_cb_cabinet c2 join tbl_cb_item i on c2.cabinet_id = i.cabinet_id and c2.tenant_id = i.tenant_id and i.use_status = 1 where i.item_id in
#itemList[]#
and c2.use_status = 1 and c2.tenant_id = #tenantId#
) c3

select d4.cn from ( select * from tbl_deptmaster d1 where d1.cn = #deptId# and d1.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select * from tbl_deptmaster d2 where d2.cn = #companyId# and d2.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select d3.* from tbl_deptmaster d3 join tbl_addjobmaster a on d3.cn = a.deptid and a.cn = #userId# and d3.tenant_id = a.tenant_id where d3.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) d4

select c3.* from ( select c1.*, s.child_permission from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 join tbl_cb_share s on c1.cabinet_id = s.cabinet_id and c1.tenant_id = s.tenant_id where s.sharer_id in
#others[]#
and ( (s.shared_id = #userId# and s.shared_type = 2) or (s.shared_id in
#deptList[]# and (s.shared_type = 0 or s.shared_type = 1) ) ) and s.use_status = 1 and s.tenant_id = #tenantId#
and s.permission = 1
) c3

select c1.cabinet_id from tbl_cb_cabinet c1 where c1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and
c1.cabinet_path like concat('%', concat(#pathList[]#, '%'))
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_cb_item ( item_id, cabinet_id, item_type, title, summary, creator_id, creator_name1, creator_name2, department_id, department_name1, department_name2, content_path, create_date, update_date, use_status, update_id, delete_id, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #itemId#, #cabinetId#, #itemType#, #title#, #summary#, #creatorId#, #creatorName1#, #creatorName2#, #departmentId#, #departmentName1#, #departmentName2#, #contentPath#, to_date(#createdDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), to_date(#updatedDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #useStatus#, #updateId#, #deleterId#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select:
select * from tbl_cb_item where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
use_status = #useStatus#

select * from ( select k.*, rownum as rnum from (
where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1 order by update_date desc, item_id desc ) k where rownum <= #startPoint# + #listCount# ) where rnum >= #startPoint# + 1

select * from ( select k.*, rownum as rnum from (
where creator_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1 and title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%')) order by update_date desc, item_id desc ) k where rownum <= #startPoint# + #listCount# ) where rnum >= #startPoint# + 1

select * from tbl_cb_item where tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1 and item_id in
#itemList[]#
select * from tbl_cb_item where tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1 and item_id = #itemId#
select nvl(max(item_id), 0) from tbl_cb_item where tenant_id = #tenantId#

select * from ( select k.*, rownum as rnum from (
from tbl_cb_item i where
and i.cabinet_id = #cabinetId# order by i.update_date desc, i.item_id desc
item_type title creator_name1 creator_name2 create_date item_size desc, i.update_date desc, i.item_id desc
) k where rownum <= #startPoint# + #listCount# ) where rnum >= #startPoint# + 1

select count(item_id) from tbl_cb_item i where
and i.cabinet_id = #cabinetId#
select count(item_id) from tbl_cb_item where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and use_status = 1 and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select count(item_id) from tbl_cb_item where creator_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1 and title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%'))

select * from ( select k.*, rownum as rnum from (
from tbl_cb_item i join ( select * from tbl_cb_cabinet where cabinet_path like concat(#cabinetPath#, '%') and use_status = 1 and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c on c.cabinet_id = i.cabinet_id and i.tenant_id = c.tenant_id where
order by i.update_date desc, i.item_id desc
item_type title creator_name1 creator_name2 create_date item_size desc, i.update_date desc, i.item_id desc
) k where rownum <= #startPoint# + #listCount# ) where rnum >= #startPoint# + 1

select count(i.item_id) from tbl_cb_item i join ( select * from tbl_cb_cabinet where cabinet_path like concat(#cabinetPath#, '%') and use_status = 1 and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c on c.cabinet_id = i.cabinet_id and i.tenant_id = c.tenant_id where
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_cb_item set update_date = #updateTime#, delete_id = #userId#, use_status = 0 where tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1 and item_id in
#itemList[]#

update tbl_cb_item set cabinet_id = #cabinetId#, update_date = #updateTime#, update_id = #userId# where tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1 and item_id in
#itemList[]#
sqlMap.select:
select nvl(sum(f.file_size), 0) from tbl_cb_attach_file f join tbl_cb_item i on f.item_id = i.item_id and f.tenant_id = i.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and i.use_status = 1 and i.item_id in
#itemList[]#

insert.selectKey: select case when (select attach_id from tbl_cb_attach_file where item_id = #itemId# and file_path = #filePath# and file_name = #fileName# and file_size = #fileSize# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) is not null then 0 else 1 end as temp from dual
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cb_attach_file (attach_id, item_id, file_path, file_name, file_size, file_description, company_id, tenant_id) values (#attachId#, #itemId#, #filePath#, #fileName#, #fileSize#, #fileDescription#, #companyId#, #tenantId#)
update tbl_cb_attach_file set file_description = #fileDescription# where item_id = #itemId# and file_path = #filePath# and file_name = #fileName# and file_size = #fileSize# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: select nvl(max(attach_id), 0) from tbl_cb_attach_file where tenant_id = #tenantId#
select * from tbl_cb_attach_file where item_id = #itemId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete:
delete from tbl_cb_attach_file where tenant_id = #tenantId# and item_id = #itemId# and attach_id in
#attachIds[]#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select item_id, relation_id from tbl_cb_relation where item_id = #itemId# and relate_item_id = #relatedItemId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cb_relation (relation_id, item_id, relate_item_id, company_id, tenant_id) values (#relationId#, #itemId#, #relatedItemId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#)

sqlMap.select: select nvl(max(relation_id), 0) from tbl_cb_relation where tenant_id = #tenantId#
select * from tbl_cb_relation where item_id = #itemId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete:
delete from tbl_cb_relation where item_id = #itemId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and relate_item_id in
#relatedIds[]#
sqlMap.select:
select s.* from tbl_cb_share s where s.use_status = 1 and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and (
( s.cabinet_id in #listNodes[]# and s.child_permission = 1 ) or
(s.cabinet_id = #cabinetId#) ) and ( ( s.shared_id = #userId# and s.shared_type = 2) or (s.shared_id in
#deptList[]# and (s.shared_type = 0 or s.shared_type = 1) ) )

select s.* from tbl_cb_share s where s.use_status = 1 and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.sharer_id = #sharerId# and (
( s.cabinet_id in #listNodes[]# and s.child_permission = 1 ) or
(s.cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and s.child_permission = 1) ) and ( ( s.shared_id = #sharedId# and s.shared_type = 2) or (s.shared_id in #deptList[]# and (s.shared_type = 0 or s.shared_type = 1) ) )
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_cb_rel (rel_id, item_id, rel_name1, rel_name2, rel_value, company_id, tenant_id) values (#columnId#, #itemId#, #columnName1#, #columnName2#, #columnValue#, #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.select: select rel_id as rel_id, item_id as item_id, case when #primary# = '1' then rel_name1 else rel_name2 end as rel_name, rel_name1 as rel_name1, rel_name2 as rel_name2, rel_value as rel_value, company_id as company_id, tenant_id as tenant_id from tbl_cb_rel where item_id = #itemId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.* from ( select case when #primary# = '1' then u.displayname else u.displayname2 end as user_name, u.mail as user_email from tbl_usermaster u where u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.mail in #mailList[]# union select case when #primary# = '1' then d.displayname else d.displayname2 end as user_name, d.mail as user_email from tbl_deptmaster d where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.mail in #mailList[]# ) a
select case when #primary# = '1' then u.displayname else u.displayname2 end as user_name, u.cn as user_id from tbl_usermaster u where u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.cn = #userId#
select case when #primary# = '1' then u.displayname else u.displayname2 end as user_name, u.cn as user_id from tbl_usermaster u where u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.cn in attendIds[]#
